programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les coachs vocaux et couple marie David et Carrie Grant echangent lharmonie vocale contre une competition acharnee dantiquites. Avec laide des experts Will Axon et Mark Stacey, le couple decouvre des objets inattendus à vendre lors d’une vente aux enchères dans la campagne du Norfolk.David fait une halte sur un terrain dherbe en plein cœur de Cambridge, où aujourdhui les enfants jouent et les chiens se promènent, mais qui etait en realite le berceau du football. Pendant ce temps, Carrie decouvre comment Letchworth Garden City a declenche une revolution dans la conception des villes.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous nous interesserons à l’artiste Robert Combas. Sa peinture est faite de libertes : elle parle de la societe, de la violence, de la sexualite, de la souffrance des gens, de leurs petits bonheurs, de leur petitesse, de leur grandeur… Il s’inspire du rock dont il est un fin amateur, des images populaires des livres d’enfance, des manuels scolaires, et de tout ce qui fait une culture populaire accessible à tous.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Edouard Manet.You will discover his labour with Lola de valence, Olympia, Eel and red mullet.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Paul Cezanne. You will discover his labour with his still-life, mill on the Couleuvre at Pontoise, Young girl with doll.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En 2013, la Norvège celebra le 150e anniversaire de la naissance dEdvard Munch (1863-1944), lune des figures proeminentes de lart moderne. Munch 150, coproduite par le Musee national et le Musee Munch, est dejà acclamee comme « lexposition dune vie ». Linteret general est enorme, comme le temoigne le resultat record de la mise aux enchères publiques de lun de ses quatre tableaux, Le Cri, soit 120 millions de dollars. Cette presentation vous amènera dans les coulisses de la mise en place de cette exposition, en plus de comprendre une visite guidee de la Norvège qui brossera la biographie de cet homme dont la vie sest etalee de la moitie du 19ème siècle jusquà loccupation allemande lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Cree à la fin du XIXe siècle par le collectionneur Richard Wallace, ce musee prive de Londres conserve une très belle collection de peintures europeennes. On peut entre autres y admirer Le cavalier riant de Frans Hals ou le Portrait de Titus, le fils de Rembrandt. La peinture française du XVIIIe siècle dans sa veine galante et rococo y est particulièrement bien representee avec, bien sûr, le chef-d’œuvre de la peinture libertine de Fragonard, Les hasards heureux de l’escarpolette.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: This is a traditional wooden townhouse built in 1743 in the center of Kyoto. Destroyed by fire in 1864, it was rebuilt identically 4 years later. Invisible codes hierarchize the use of spaces. There are no walls or windows, "its an accumulation of voids". This fluid, flexible space is a source of inspiration for contemporary architecture.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Après deux ans d’exposition itinerante, en 2015 "La Jeune Fille à la perle” est retournee au musee Mauritshuis de La Haye. Du haut de ses 350 ans, l’eternelle Jeune Fille a toujours su conserver son aura de mystère et son charme. La preuve, c’est le nombre de curieux (1,2 millions) qui ont accouru pour l’apercevoir lors de son sejour au Japon. Le documentaire cherche à decouvrir les nombreuses enigmes de cet extraordinaire tableau et de son createur mysterieux - Vermeer. Qui etait cette fille ? Pourquoi et comment Vermeer a-t-il peint ce tableau ? Venez voyager dans le temps pour decouvrir Johannes Vermeer, visiter le charmant musee de La Haye et repondre à toutes ces questions.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En juin 2017, une grande exposition a ouvert à Paris au musee d’Orsay. Pour la première fois, cette exposition a reuni tous les portraits de Cezanne. Cela a ete l’occasion d’analyser l’œuvre de Cezanne à l’aide d’experts internationaux et de parcourir les salles de la National Portrait Gallery de Londres et de la National Gallery of Art de Washington.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: 200 years after it opened and a century after acquiring its first Van Gogh works, the National Gallery hosted the largest Van Gogh exhibition ever held in the UK (September 14, 2024 to January 19, 2025). The exhibition was a huge success, unanimously praised by the press, and tickets sold out quickly, making this film the only way to see what Forbes called a “once-in-a-lifetime exhibition.”Discover the passion that drove one of the worlds most beloved artists to revolutionize art. Van Gogh: Poets and Lovers rewrites history and celebrates Van Goghs genius without exploiting his suffering, allowing audiences to truly understand this iconic artist in a whole new way...

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Antonio Canal, known as Canaletto, and Francesco Guardi are the best known 18th century painters of the urban Venetian landscape. In minute detail, they painted iconic views of the Venetian Republic, destined for rich foreign visitors. “Maria della Salute from the Grand Canal in Venice” by Canaletto and “Venice: Piazza San Marco” by Guardi followed this trend. Later Venice also inspired Paul Signac’s “The Green Veil, Venice”. Go on a voyage of discovery...Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, on relève le piquant avec les gastronomes gourmets Tony Singh et Cyrus Todiwala. Les chefs sont accompagnes de David Harper et Natasha Raskin.Partant de Dundee, ils descendent la côte est de l’Écosse jusqu’au village de Rosewell, dans le Midlothian, pour une vente aux enchères. Cyrus demontre un talent certain pour negocier, tandis que Tony n’hesite pas à afficher ses prix.Tony decouvre pourquoi une ville ecossaise a ete le foyer de nombreux millionnaires, et Cyrus prend ses marques en mer en apprenant pourquoi Anstruther etait un port de peche cle au XIXe siècle.

programme.title: Backlight : NFT Mania
programme.desc: NFTs are non-fungible tokens, a type of digital property deeds that makes virtual images negotiable. For some time now, NFTs have been the expensive new toys of often young, anonymous collectors with a lot of cryptocurrency.

programme.title: Andy Warhol, Fluorescent
programme.desc: Warhol, revolutionary and controversial, was never afraid to break the mold and reshape the reals of art, advertising, and directing. But who was the real man being behind the colors in which he hid? Was it the art or the fame that controlled and spawned his unique creativity?

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Le street Art s’est, depuis les annees 1980, glisse dans les villes et ses artistes s’octroient une place grandissante dans l’espace urbain, mais aussi dans les collections d’art. Installe à Lille, Jef Aerosol fait partie des historiques du Street Art français avec option pochoir. Son genre, c’est le portrait, et il a longtemps puise dans l’univers musical pour decliner sa passion. L’artiste est collectionne aujourd’hui par les plus grands amateurs de Street Art.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vincent Van Gogh : une nouvelle façon de voir
programme.desc: La vie de Vincent van Gogh reste entouree de mystère : folie, maladie, suicide, les ingredients pour creer un mythe sont tous reunis. Beneficiant d’un accès complet et sans precedent aux tresors du Van Gogh Museum d’Amsterdam, ce documentaire met en lumière à la fois l’un des artistes preferes du monde et la collection riche et unique du musee. Decouvrez ces merveilleux chefs-d’œuvre sur grand ecran pendant que quelques invites y compris les conservateurs de renommee mondiale et des historiens de l’art offrent leurs interpretations et des explications sur le travail de Van Gogh.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Qui etait Frida Kahlo ? Voyagez dans la vie dune veritable icône, decouvrez son art et la verite qui se cache derrière sa vie souvent mouvementee. La combinaison dinterviews, de commentaires et dune exploration detaillee de lart de Kahlo, offre un tresor de couleurs et un festin de vitalite. Ce documentaire personnel et intime offre un accès privilegie à ses œuvres, et met en lumière sa creativite febrile, sa resilience et sa soif inegalee pour la vie.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Lynne Faulds Wood and John Stapleton
programme.desc: Un Road Trip en couple de celebrites – les journalistes primes John Stapleton et Lynn Faulds Wood.Ils sont rejoints par Thomas Plant et Margie Cooper pour cette aventure. Avec 400 £ chacun, les equipes commencent à Wrightington, dans le Lancashire, et se dirigent vers Stockport pour une vente aux enchères.Lynn et Thomas se retrouvent litteralement jusquaux genoux dans des antiquites en cherchant de vieilles boîtes à biscuits, tandis que Margie tente de convaincre John que des lampes rares feront un joli profit.John apprend comment un Americain a revolutionne les transports publics britanniques, et Lynn decouvre pourquoi on traite du lait de serpent à Liverpool.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, well talk with Jordan Matter, photographer. He has created a series called "the 10 minute photo challenge" that can be seen on an online video platform, in which he photographs dancers in unusual situations. He likes this process because having only 10 minutes to take pictures forces him to not think too much and to take the picture in the moment.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Jean-Jacques Lequeu - Builder of fantasies" at the Petit Palais. This exhibition is dedicated to the work of the late 18th century architect Jean-Jacques Lequeu. Despite his profession, he was not known for his constructions, but for his drawings. He made many portraits or drawings of everyday objects, architectural diagrams.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Rembrandt: without a doubt the greatest painter in the Netherlands. Admired all over the world, especially for his play with light and dark. He was a Dutch celebrity avant la lettre, the superstar of the Golden Age ... A master of portraying human emotions, especially when it comes to his self-portraits. Technical virtuoso, but also ruthlessly honest. Rembrant painted his first self-portrait when he was 22. A small, but technically very refined work: "Self-portrait at an early age." Is the team able to unravel some of the secrets of Rembrandts shadow play?

programme.title: China - Masters of the Arts
programme.sub-title: Yan Gongda - The Art of Calligraphy
programme.desc: While the hieroglyphs of Egypt and the cuneiform of Babylon have disappeared, Chinese calligraphy, also graphic and non-alphabetic, has endured through the ages. Of divinatory origin, Chinese characters carry not only a language but a unique way of thinking. A 84th-generation descendant of one of Confucius’s best-known disciples, calligrapher Yan Gongda unrolls before our camera the timeless story of a writing art closer to painting than graphology. Through this story, the entire history of China is told.

programme.title: Museum Tour
programme.sub-title: L’aube du pop art - Dans l’œil de Fernand Leger
programme.desc: Museum Tour is a series that invites the viewer to discover unique which, for the artists chosen, have been incubators of creativity and a source of inspiration. Under their patronage, some of those sites have been turned into museums or foundations where their memory and work have picked up a life of their own.Each of the episodes will tell the story uniting the artist with a particular place, seeking intimacy in the process.This show’s agenda is decidedly visual. Works of art and the places in which they’re set will be filmed in such a way as to arouse strong emotions, thus placing the viewer in the spot, as if they were present in the flesh. This angle for the spectacular and search for beauty will enhance the accessibility of the series for an uninformed audience.A family-friendly documentary series which, beyond the fascinating information provided, offers a sight, sound and emotional journey into a captivating, palpable and contemporary form.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: Secret treasures takes you on a journey to discover the unsuspected secrets and treasures of the National Assembly in France. Some of the most delicate works are kept in the greatest secrecy. But this place, which is the temple of the French democracy, opens its doors to us exceptionally today. We will make you discover this emblematic universe, more known for its political episodes than for the treasures that it shelters.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Picasso. Blue and Pink" at the Musee dOrsay in Paris. This is an exceptional event because it is the first exhibition in France dedicated to the artists blue and pink period. This exhibition brings together about 300 works by the artist during this period from 1900 to 1906, including "Woman with a Fan". During this period of his life, Picasso was between 18 and 25 years old and began to assert his artistic identity.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Painting the Modern Garden - Monet to Matisse
programme.desc: Passionne d’horticulture, Monet reste sans conteste le maître de la peinture de jardins dans l’histoire de l’art, mais il n’etait pas seul. Des artistes tels que Van Gogh, Bonnard, Picasso et Matisse ont utilise le jardin comme thème fort de leur œuvre. Ces grands artistes, ainsi que bien d’autres noms celèbres, sont rassembles dans une exposition innovante du Cleveland Museum of Art et de la Royal Gallery of Arts de Londres. De l’exposition elle-meme à la beaute des jardins d’artistes comme celui de Monet à Giverny, nous partons en voyage pour decouvrir comment le jardin moderne etait utilise pour explorer de nouvelles idees radicales et merveilleuses.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Leonard de Vinci est l’un des artistes les plus adules au monde. De nombreux films et series documentaires se sont interesses à son genie hors du commun, sans pour autant preter attention à ce qu’il y a de plus parlant : son art. Les tableaux et dessins incomparables de Leonard de Vinci seront au centre de notre film et Exhibition on screen vous presentera la totalite des tableaux qui lui sont attribues. Marquant les 500 ans de la mort de ce genie, ce documentaire est une reference sur Leonard de Vinci, le premier à raconter son histoire dans sa globalite.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: An emblematic figure in Europe at the turn of the 18th century, this corporal who became Emperor of France unleashed the imagination of artists from whom he commissioned many works. Discover the victorious young “Bonaparte at the Pont d’Arcole” immortalised by the Antoine-Jean Gros in 1796. Observe also the portraits of all the guests present during the “Coronation of Napoleon” and his triumphant gesture as he crowned his wife Josephine in David’s masterpiece displayed in the Louvre Museum. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les actrices et amies de Casualty, Susan Cookson et Suzanne Packer, troquent leurs blouses de chirurgie contre une Sunbeam Tiger de 1965 pour se lancer dans une competition à travers le Nord-Ouest de l’Angleterre, accompagnees des experts James Braxton et David Harper.Susan decouvre son côte negociatrice, tandis que Suzanne garde un œil très vigilant sur le budget, cherchant à trouver un objet vraiment ancien.Au fil du voyage à travers le Yorkshire, elles ont lopportunite de rencontrer une femme très speciale de Sheffield et de visiter des jardins incroyables avec une histoire fascinante.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Auguste Renoir. You will discover his labour with Girls at the piano, The Bathers, still-life with apples and pears.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Raphaël. You will discover his labour with Spozalizio, The virgin and child with St John the Baptist or portrait of Baldassare Castiglione.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vermeer and music - the art of love and leisure
programme.desc: La National Gallery de Londres propose un nouveau regard sur lun des plus grands artistes de tous les temps, Johannes Vermeer. Il est le peintre de la celèbre toile “La Jeune Fille à la perle”. Dans une exposition intitulee "Vermeer et la musique : Lart de lamour et des loisirs

From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: My little Museum

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Tanni Grey Thompson and Jade Jones
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, nous sommes dans le Nord-Est de lAngleterre avec les grandes paralympiennes en fauteuil roulant Tanni Grey-Thompson et Jade Jones. Tanni, avec son impressionnant palmarès de medailles et de records, est accompagnee de sa jeune protegee Jade, qui debute sa carrière en athletisme.Avec les experts Phil Serrell et David Harper, la baronne du comte de Durham et Jade, de Middlesbrough, partiront à la recherche dantiquites à vendre lors dune vente aux enchères à Harrogate.Tanni tente egalement sa chance dans la fabrication traditionnelle du verre, tandis que Jade decouvre lhistoire de lhomme qui fut un pionnier du design dans la region.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: Secret treasures takes you on a journey to discover the unsuspected secrets and treasures of the National Assembly in France. Some of the most delicate works are kept in the greatest secrecy. But this place, which is the temple of the French democracy, opens its doors to us exceptionally today. We will make you discover this emblematic universe, more known for its political episodes than for the treasures that it shelters.

programme.title: China-France: Glory of civilizations
programme.desc: As of the 17th century, Chinese objects fascinated the kings of France while French tapestries and astronomical instruments impressed Emperor Kangxis China. A look back at four centuries of artistic dialogue between East and West, in the magnificent settings of the Palace of Versailles, the Forbidden City and Jingdezhen.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Karel Appel’s father forced him to take over the hairdressing business, but Karel only wanted one thing: to become a painter. And he did: A great master ahead of his time, a world famous painter even. In 1949, when he was still unknown and penniless, he made "Child, Church, Animal". Actually nothing is known about the construction of this painting. Not more than you can discover at first sight. To find out more, we have to take a closer look at the work using a microscope. It seems as if the work consists of several layers.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Fernand Khnopff - The master of the enigma
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Fernand Khnopff - The master of the enigma" at the Petit Palais in Paris. The work that introduces the visit of the exhibition dedicated to this amazing artist is called "silence". The artist represented landscapes of his childhood in the Ardennes in France. But he also painted portraits, paintings representing his mother as his painting entitled "Listening to Schumann".

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Genre pictural existant depuis l’Antiquite, la nature morte connut un regain d’interet à partir du XVIIe siècle dans la peinture europeenne. Representation composee d’elements inanimes, elle peut se limiter à la table d’un repas, comme dans le frugal Dessert de gaufrettes de Lubin Baugin, ou d’animaux chasses comme dans la Nature morte au faisan de Jean-Baptiste Oudry. Retrouvez egalement des natures mortes celèbres de Chardin, Cezanne et Van Gogh.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: La Casa Milà, que lon appelle communement "la Pedrera

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts etait la toute première retrospective consacree au portrait dÉdouard Manet. Couvrant lensemble de la carrière de cet artiste enigmatique et parfois controverse, lexposition a rassemble des œuvres provenant dEurope, dAsie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet na jamais fait lobjet dune exposition, bien quil represente environ la moitie de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalites litteraires, politiques et artistiques de lepoque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la societe parisienne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Goya : visions de chair et de sang
programme.desc: Francisco Goya, considere comme le fondateur de l’art moderne, est l’artiste espagnol le plus acclame. En plus d’observer avec talent la vie et le passe mouvemente de l’Espagne, c’est un portraitiste doue et un commentateur social par excellence. Avec Goya, l’art du portrait atteint de nouveaux sommets. Cette exposition majeure de la National Gallery de Londres remet son genie en lumière. À travers une formidable collection d’oeuvres uniques et de lettres de Goya, nous analysons l’homme lui-meme et le monde qu’il peignait.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous nous interesserons à l’artiste Robert Combas. Sa peinture est faite de libertes : elle parle de la societe, de la violence, de la sexualite, de la souffrance des gens, de leurs petits bonheurs, de leur petitesse, de leur grandeur… Il s’inspire du rock dont il est un fin amateur, des images populaires des livres d’enfance, des manuels scolaires, et de tout ce qui fait une culture populaire accessible à tous.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet David Bellemere, fashion, celebrity and beauty photographer. He discovered his love for photography in school. For two years he traveled to Asia, and it became the most influential theme in his photographic style. The time spent in Asia allowed him to focus his work on the use of natural light and architecture while adding feminine sensuality and fashion, in order to reproduce "erotic" but graceful images.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, well get to know Arthur Elgort, an American fashion photographer. He started out photographing dancers in college. He eventually turned to fashion photography after that because he couldnt make a living photographing dancers. Fashion was the closest he could get to it.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Tanni Grey Thompson and Jade Jones
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, nous sommes dans le Nord-Est de lAngleterre avec les grandes paralympiennes en fauteuil roulant Tanni Grey-Thompson et Jade Jones. Tanni, avec son impressionnant palmarès de medailles et de records, est accompagnee de sa jeune protegee Jade, qui debute sa carrière en athletisme.Avec les experts Phil Serrell et David Harper, la baronne du comte de Durham et Jade, de Middlesbrough, partiront à la recherche dantiquites à vendre lors dune vente aux enchères à Harrogate.Tanni tente egalement sa chance dans la fabrication traditionnelle du verre, tandis que Jade decouvre lhistoire de lhomme qui fut un pionnier du design dans la region.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It’s a journey into antiquity with glamorous historians Suzannah Lipscomb and Kate Williams. Paired with experts David Harper and Catherine Southon they Road Trip from Bletchley in Buckinghamshire to an auction in London. There’s also opportunity to hear how Mrs Beeton became the first ‘domestic Goddess’ and why Luton played a critical role in the fashion world when hats were de rigueur daily wear. David and Suzannah gamble on a giant ant while Catherine and Kate plump for a very large tea urn.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The Impressionists are the most popular group in art history - millions flock every year to marvel at their masterpieces. But, to begin with, they were scorned, penniless outsiders. 1874 was the year that changed everything; the first Impressionists, “hungry for independence”, broke the mould by holding their own exhibition outside official channels. Impressionism was born and the art world was changed forever.What led to that first groundbreaking show 150 years ago? Who were the maverick personalities that wielded their brushes in such a radical and provocative way? The spectacular Musee d’Orsay exhibition brings fresh eyes to this extraordinary tale of passion and rebellion. The story is told not by historians and curators but in the words of those who witnessed the dawn of Impressionism: the artists, press and people of Paris, 1874. See the show that changed everything on the big screen.

programme.title: Rothko – Hartung: Colors and Cataclysms
programme.desc: Rothko and Hans Hartung forged a discreet, friendly and fertile bond. This documentary introduces the discovery of this little known and fascinating complicity between both artists.

programme.title: Andy Warhol, Fluorescent
programme.desc: Warhol, revolutionary and controversial, was never afraid to break the mold and reshape the reals of art, advertising, and directing. But who was the real man being behind the colors in which he hid? Was it the art or the fame that controlled and spawned his unique creativity?

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the exhibition "Cubism" at the Centre Pompidou. This exhibition gathers more than 300 works and focuses on the history of this founding movement of the 20th century. We will start from the sources of cubism, by presenting what the artists saw and looked at to free themselves from all the academic conventions of this time. We will also see that music had a very important place in the works of this movement as in the work "Musical Instruments" by Georges Braque.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le curieux monde de Hieronymus Bosch
programme.desc: La ville natale de Bosch aux Pays-Bas ne possède pas de tableaux du peintre et pourtant, pour la grande exposition « Visions of Genius » qui a eu lieu à l’anniversaire de sa mort en 2016, le musee Noordbrabants a reussi à reunir la presque totalite des tableaux et dessins de Bosch. C’est en 2008 que le directeur du musee a commence sa tournee dans les plus grands musees d’Europe et Etats-Unis pour en persuader les directeurs de preter au musee Noordbrabants leurs œuvres, en echange d’un travail d’analyse et de recherche sur les tableaux en pret. Ainsi « Hieronymus Bosch. Visions of Genius » a ete l’exposition la plus ambitieuse dediee au peintre hollandais. Ce documentaire sera une plongee dans l’univers etrange et visionnaire de Hieronymus Bosch.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Matisse au MoMA et à la Tate Modern
programme.desc: Decouvrez l’œuvre de Matisse à travers les expositions de la Tate Modern à Londres et du MoMA de New York (2014) et profitez de la performance originale de la danseuse etoile du Royal Ballet Zenaida Yanowsky, qui interprète les couleurs et le dynamisme de la peinture de Matisse sur la musique jazz de Courtney Pine. Ponctue d’entrevues avec des experts ainsi que d’images d’archives rares de Matisse au travail, ce documentaire permettra d’apprecier tout particulièrement le dernier chapitre de la carrière du peintre et notamment ses gouaches decoupees.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « Les Tournesols » sont parmi les tableaux de Van Gogh les plus celèbres. Le musee Van Gogh à Amsterdam a consacre une exposition à ces œuvres et « Exhibition on screen », qui a eu un accès exclusif à l’evenement, nous guide à travers l’exposition pour enqueter sur les mystères qui entourent ces tableaux. Le film nous amènera egalement à Tokyo, Philadelphie, Londres et Munich pour suivre les 5 principales œuvres de l’exposition.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Tout à la fois peintre et diplomate, Pierre-Paul Rubens (1577-1640) fut un personnage essentiel dans l’Europe artistique du XVIIe siècle. Il crea de vastes compositions pour les familles princières d’alors, comme le cycle sur la vie de Marie de Medicis, aujourd’hui conserve au musee du Louvre. Il incarne la veine baroque du Nord de l’Europe, developpant un style tout en mouvement et aux touches colorees lumineuses, comme dans l’Enlèvement des filles de Leucippe expose à Munich.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: William Blake (1757-1827) developed his own complex and personal mythology. He was a pre-romantic British painter, engraver and poet.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, on relève le piquant avec les gastronomes gourmets Tony Singh et Cyrus Todiwala. Les chefs sont accompagnes de David Harper et Natasha Raskin.Partant de Dundee, ils descendent la côte est de l’Écosse jusqu’au village de Rosewell, dans le Midlothian, pour une vente aux enchères. Cyrus demontre un talent certain pour negocier, tandis que Tony n’hesite pas à afficher ses prix.Tony decouvre pourquoi une ville ecossaise a ete le foyer de nombreux millionnaires, et Cyrus prend ses marques en mer en apprenant pourquoi Anstruther etait un port de peche cle au XIXe siècle.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In this episode, the two candidates Stephany Mora and Harleena will compete on an imposed theme. Today, the theme is vineyards. They will have one hour to take the best picture possible. Let’s see who will win.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Franco-Danish painter, Camille Pissarro. You will discover his labour with View from Louveciennes, A path through the fields, Pontoise or Peasant girl making a fire.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Prussian painter, Caspar David Friedrich. You will discover his labour with The Wanderer above the mists, Greifswald port or the Lone tree.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, notre passionne de decoration, cest Pierre. À 43 ans, ce Spadois, père de trois enfants, a dejà vecu plusieurs vies. Si Pierre a decroche plusieurs medailles pendant sa carrière sportive cette semaine, cest la première place du podium des as de la deco quil va tenter de gravir. Son atout pour la competition ? Sa fibre artistique.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: This week it’s the semi-finals and the competition hits a new level with our four remaining pairs all competing at the same time to create amazing gardens at the Glenfield Hospital in Leicester. Separated into 2 semi-finals, each with their own brief, the pressure increases as the plots get bigger and the budget goes up to £7500, whilst still only having 48 hours to complete them. In semi-final 1 Tamara and Kate take on husband and wife team Catherine and James Burrage where they’re challenge to create a garden for the staff of the hospital to use. While in semi-final 2 Scottish pair James and Stuart take on the youngest pair in the competition, recent graduates Millie and Max, as they’re challenged to create gardens for the hospital’s patients.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Marseillais dorigine, Guillaume a eu un coup de cœur pour notre capitale et a decide de sy installer comme agent immobilier, une profession a priori fort eloignee du monde artistique. Mais depuis lecole, notre Bruxellois dadoption a bien change. Aujourdhui, il nourrit une passion devorante pour la creation de meubles dont son domicile est litteralement rempli.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Le jour de la grande finale est arrive. Aujourdhui, les candidats decouvriront enfin la note de leur proprietaire et surtout leur reaction en rentrant chez eux. Mais avant cela, nos concurrents vont decouvrir tour à tour ce que les autres candidats ont pense de leur chantier. Et cest Melanie qui ouvre le bal. La jeune femme est la première à rejoindre latelier pour y retrouver Valerie Damidot, notre expert de deco.

It’s the perfect routine for all levels, even in small spaces.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Strengthen and Surrender: Lower Body Balance for Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: This moving meditation leads you through a series of postures that will strengthen the hips and hamstrings. Find balance between ease and effort while bringing a sense of curiosity to your experience of each posture.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: La semaine touche à sa fin. Celine, Aurelie, Gaëtan et Emmanuele vont faire face aux critiques de leurs adversaires. Mais surtout, les proprietaires vont enfin rentrer chez eux et decouvrir leur pièce entièrement redecoree. Que penseront-ils de leur nouvel interieur ? Quels points vont-ils attribuer ? Car leurs notes peuvent tout faire basculer et renverser le classement actuel. Qui remportera la competition ? Qui repartira avec les 2000 € et le titre d’As de la deco de la semaine ?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la region aux côtes de la petillante Marithe. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glaces maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce periple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcement l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus precisement dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau etre le premier port de peche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone reservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour decouvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’elevage dans une ferme aquacole en Mediterranee, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et meme le cabillaud dans l’immense marche de Rungis. Julie a challenge le Chef Olivier Bellin installe à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson meconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associe à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immateriel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompes : avec près de 1 000 varietes - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillees, ou encore pressees, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo gives you ideas for recipes that are easy to prepare using a wok! Thanks to this cooking method, you can create delicious, quick recipes using leftovers from your fridge or cupboard.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Coconut milk is easy to cook, and can be used with a wide range of ingredients, from stews and soups to sweet recipes.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Defendre l’eau c’est defendre la vie - Partie 2
programme.desc: On se retrouve en Israël dans le désert du Neguev, Elaine cherche des solutions pour lutter contre la désertification. L’objet de ses recherches : les arbres, peu consommateurs d’eau. Au Mali, on retrouve les Dogons : les cultivateurs du désert. Il nous fait découvrir les recettes de son peuple pour gérer l’eau. Dans cette partie du Mali où il ne pleut quasiment jamais. En Palestine, le village de Wadi Fukeen. Un village où les agriculteurs utilisent un système d’irrigation et de partage de l’eau vieux de plus de 300 ans et basé sur le respect et la confiance. Et en Palestine à Gaza où les specialistes se battent pour sauver des enfants palestiniens rendus malades par de l’eau impropre à la consommation. Dans la Vallée du Jourdain où trois pays en conflit affrontent les mêmes problèmes : le manque d’eau. Au Bresil, dans le château d’eau du Brésil où l’eau, d’une pureté exceptionnelle est menacée par l’exploitation du minerai de fer qui pollue la nappe phréatique. Et à.

programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, the team invites you to a 100% chair-based session! Sabrina leads you through gentle but effective exercises that activate the whole body. programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour decouvrir des races anciennes de volaille reintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’eleveur Fred Menager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour decouvrir comment est attribue le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Perigord pour preparer un civet de dindon. Installee dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour decouvrir un etonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Quel bonheur de retrouver ce fruit printanier ! Les fraises redonnent des couleurs à nos assiettes et nous apportent une bonne dose de vitamines et d’antioxydants. Dans cet episode, Luana Belmondo nous devoile deux recettes sucrees autour des fraises.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Pour les paresseux et tous ceux qui n’ont pas le temps, Luana Belmondo propose deux petites recettes simples et efficaces. Decouvrez son pain à lail et au fromage, et ses spaghettis à lail.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Our Swiss journey begins at the Neuro Culinary Center, where a gastroenterology researcher demonstrates how sugar affects blood glucose in real time. Through hands-on testing, we see immediate physiological responses, sparking conversations about metabolism, diet, and long-term health.Next, we visit the Herb Hotel, where hyper-local alpine ingredients create rich, grounded flavours connected to season and place. We learn traditional cheese-making methods before visiting Salzano, a renowned Green Michelin Star restaurant known for elevating Swiss mountain cuisine.The day ends with a sunset hike up a mountain, finishing with raclette melted over an open flame—a perfect celebration of the region’s flavour, simplicity, and beauty.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: At the VitalLife Scientific Wellness Center at Bumrungrad Hospital in Bangkok, Mike and Braeden undergo some of the most advanced longevity testing available today. Through comprehensive genetic panels, metabolic assessments, cardiovascular imaging, cellular aging analysis, and biomarker evaluations, they gain a deep understanding of their current and future health.They then undergo hyperbaric oxygen therapy, targeted light therapy, and personalized consultations to interpret their results and identify pathways for improving health span. The episode offers a rare look inside the future of preventive medicine and the growing global movement toward longevity science.Here, technology and tradition converge, revealing how we can extend not just our lifespan, but the years we remain healthy, active, and fulfilled.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: This powerful episode follows a group of Canadian students—many from small, rural communities—as they embark on their first journey outside the country. Cambodia becomes their living classroom, offering lessons rarely found in textbooks.Together, we explore temples, farms, and cultural sites, witnessing their evolving perspectives as they encounter new customs, foods, and ways of life. At Angkor Wat, students learn how history, spirituality, and mindfulness have shaped Cambodian culture for centuries.The transformations are immediate and profound. Students reflect on global inequality, cultural resilience, and what it means to see the world through new eyes. This episode is a celebration of experiential education and the life-changing impact of travel on young minds.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: We embark on a unique journey around the world to film our series but behind the scenes explore the effects of stress on the human body. Equipped with cutting-edge Hexo Skin sensors and other wearable tech, we subject ourselves to adrenaline-pumping activities like skydiving and roller coaster rides, as well as draining experiences like red-eye flights. By monitoring real-time data, we gain fascinating insights into how various stressors impact our physiological responses. From heart rate fluctuations to sleep monitoring this episode reveals how stress can be both an exhilarating and exhausting experience. As we push the limits of adventure—and our own comfort zones—we discover that creating a health series can be a surprisingly stressful endeavor in itself. Tune in to uncover the multifaceted impact of stress on our well-being and learn what we can do to manage it effectively.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Norway - Friluftsliv (Open Air Life) Part I
programme.desc: We travel to Tromsø, Norway, to discover Friluftsliv, a philosophy that values reconnecting with nature for well-being. Alongside the Sámi people, we learn to live in harmony with the Arctic environment, even during long, dark winters. The deep bond between the Sámi and reindeer shows how nature is a source of happiness and healing.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: This week it’s the semi-finals and the competition hits a new level with our four remaining pairs all competing at the same time to create amazing gardens at the Glenfield Hospital in Leicester. Separated into 2 semi-finals, each with their own brief, the pressure increases as the plots get bigger and the budget goes up to £7500, whilst still only having 48 hours to complete them. In semi-final 1 Tamara and Kate take on husband and wife team Catherine and James Burrage where they’re challenge to create a garden for the staff of the hospital to use. While in semi-final 2 Scottish pair James and Stuart take on the youngest pair in the competition, recent graduates Millie and Max, as they’re challenged to create gardens for the hospital’s patients.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Norway - Friluftsliv (Open Air Life) Part II
programme.desc: A climb in the Lyngen Alps leads us to an untouched mountain summit, followed by a spectacular ski descent. We then dive into the icy Arctic waters to explore a unique underwater world, ending the day with a Norwegian sauna experience. This episode highlights the physical and mental benefits of connecting with the elements.

Mais avant de saffronter chacun leur tour à coups de pinceaux et de clous, nos quatre decorateurs amateurs ont rendez-vous dans l’atelier. C’est loccasion de jauger leurs adversaires. La première pretendante au titre dAs de la deco, cest Celine, une Bruxelloise de 35 ans.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie reprend la route à bord de sa petite voiture rouge pour faire honneur à l’un de ses fruits favoris : la châtaigne. Julie ira à la rencontre de plusieurs producteurs en Ardèche, cuisinera la soupe traditionnelle de la region aux côtes de la petillante Marithe. Elle fera aussi la recette des marrons glaces maison, avant de filer en Corse pour travailler la farine de châtaignes et les feuilles de son arbre. Ce periple s’achèvera comme toujours avec une recette de chef astucieuse et cette-fois ce sera Claude Brioude qui s’y collera ! Ce chef aime bousculer les codes et travaillera la châtaigne avec le poisson, deux produits de saison que l’on n’a pas forcement l’habitude de marier.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today, its 26-year-old Aurelie whos throwing herself into the ring. Originally from Nice, France, she has been passionate about decorating since she was a little girl. She decided to leave her job as a window dresser to go back to school to study decoration. In life as in decorating, Aurelie knows where to go. In fact, she already has definite ideas about this weeks theme, "urban jungle".

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus precisement dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau etre le premier port de peche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone reservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour decouvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’elevage dans une ferme aquacole en Mediterranee, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et meme le cabillaud dans l’immense marche de Rungis. Julie a challenge le Chef Olivier Bellin installe à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson meconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, lets discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. This commitment is shared by several chefs whom Julie will meet at the conclusion of her expedition.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If youre a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brevonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, well explore the Libournais region, where well uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, well arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo gives you ideas for recipes that are easy to prepare using a wok! Thanks to this cooking method, you can create delicious, quick recipes using leftovers from your fridge or cupboard.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Coconut milk is easy to cook, and can be used with a wide range of ingredients, from stews and soups to sweet recipes.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Lets hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. Well visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... Well cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. Well then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, well discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Direction le Loir-et-Cher pour une chasse à courre encadree par les equipes de l’ONCFS. Prenons ensuite la route des Vosges pour cuisiner aux côtes de Mauricette une savoureuse gigue de cerf. Allons à la rencontre de Pierre en Côte d’Or où il fabrique des trompes de chasse, un outil indispensable à la venerie. Julie retrouvera aussi deux chasseurs girondins pour une après-midi de chasse à la tonne dès plus originale avant de rejoindre Joël en Aquitaine pour une autre recette de gibier à plume. Nous parlerons ensuite avec Laurent du metier de piqueux : ce dresseur de chiens destines à la venerie. Cette fois-ci ce sera Frederic Robert qui nous concoctera une recette de lièvre frotte au cacao et cuit dans un sarcophage d’argile.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Balance and Bend: Balance and Connect
programme.desc: Stand tall and find your truest state of focus and center with this balancing flow. Use the breath to align your posture and learn to experience your practice, rather than thinking it through. Asanas, the physical yoga poses, then become a practice of feeling more than a mental exercise.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Si l’ete est la saison où les legumes abondent au potager, il serait dommage de ne pas savourer ceux que les saisons plus fraîches nous offrent : potages, tourtes, potees ou gratins mettent à l’honneur des legumes de saisons, ideals pour se rechauffer. Pour debuter ce nouveau voyage, un legume qui trônait dejà sur les tables de la Grèce Antique : le salsifis que Julie cuisinera avec une drôle de tourtière…L’hiver c’est aussi la saison du chou alors direction la Champagne pour y apprendre la recette de la potee locale qui devrait remplir le ventre d’un grand nombre de convives.Ce petit tour de France nous emmènera aussi à la decouverte d’orfèvres du maraîchage qui sculptent legumes et fruits d’hiver, et vous presentera differentes techniques et methodes pour sublimer vos potagers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is a mushroom that we are going to focus on today. A mushroom, or a black diamond, some would say: the truffle.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo met lavocat à lhonneur, ce fruit originaire du Mexique qui presente de nombreux bienfaits pour notre sante. Elle nous propose une recette de gambas à la puree de concombres et avocats, ainsi quune panna cotta à lavocat accompagnee de sa salade de fraises.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Les aperos improvises, ce n’est pas toujours facile. Quand les amis debarquent sans prevenir, le stress peut vite monter. Pas de panique, Luana Belmondo et Thomas Clouet, grand specialiste en la matière, improvisent un apero au pied leve avec trois fois rien. Des macarons de champignons, un mini tartare de bœuf, et le tour est joue !

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: USA : La fin du petrole - Partie 2
programme.desc: La fin du petrole, c’est la fabuleuse histoire d’une matière première qui, en à peine un siècle, a revolutionne la vie des hommes. Mais aujourd’hui, les reserves de petrole s’epuisent. Dans sa course folle à toujours plus de production, l’Homme n’a pas su preserver cette energie precieuse que la Terre a mis des millions d’annees à lui offrir. Pour raconter l’aventure du petrole, Yann Arthus-Bertrand et son equipe sont partis aux Etats-Unis, pays le plus dependant à l’or noir. En ce debut du XXIe siècle, il est urgent de prendre conscience que les ressources en petrole sont limitees. C’est aujourd’hui qu’il faut agir et s’organiser, pour preparer la nouvelle ère qui s’annonce. Alors que toutes nos economies sont basees sur le cours du baril, demain, dans 20, 30 ou 100 ans, il faudra vivre sans petrole. Quelles en seront les consequences ? Quelles sont les solutions qui s’offrent à nous ? Dans cette seconde partie, Yann Arthus-Bertrand continue dexplorer les reponses à ces questions. D.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: At the VitalLife Scientific Wellness Center at Bumrungrad Hospital in Bangkok, Mike and Braeden undergo some of the most advanced longevity testing available today. Through comprehensive genetic panels, metabolic assessments, cardiovascular imaging, cellular aging analysis, and biomarker evaluations, they gain a deep understanding of their current and future health.They then undergo hyperbaric oxygen therapy, targeted light therapy, and personalized consultations to interpret their results and identify pathways for improving health span. The episode offers a rare look inside the future of preventive medicine and the growing global movement toward longevity science.Here, technology and tradition converge, revealing how we can extend not just our lifespan, but the years we remain healthy, active, and fulfilled.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: This powerful episode follows a group of Canadian students—many from small, rural communities—as they embark on their first journey outside the country. Cambodia becomes their living classroom, offering lessons rarely found in textbooks.Together, we explore temples, farms, and cultural sites, witnessing their evolving perspectives as they encounter new customs, foods, and ways of life. At Angkor Wat, students learn how history, spirituality, and mindfulness have shaped Cambodian culture for centuries.The transformations are immediate and profound. Students reflect on global inequality, cultural resilience, and what it means to see the world through new eyes. This episode is a celebration of experiential education and the life-changing impact of travel on young minds.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: With Bangladesh as a running thread, Yann Arthus-Bertrand meets several people who have changed their lives to dedicate themselves to a major project. In Bangladesh, Yves and Runa Marre have created the Friendship Foundation. Among other things, they’ve created a floating hospital installed on an old barge bought in France. Julie Andersen, an ex-advertising executive from New York has come to South Africa to defend sharks with her Shark Angels Foundation. In North India, Kartik Satyanarayan is helping to stop the dreadful exploitation of the lippus bears (dancing bears). He’s created Wildlife SOS, a preserve to rehabilitate the bears that have been rescued and to give work to the men of the tribe who were traditionally bear tamers and entertainers.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: We embark on a unique journey around the world to film our series but behind the scenes explore the effects of stress on the human body. Equipped with cutting-edge Hexo Skin sensors and other wearable tech, we subject ourselves to adrenaline-pumping activities like skydiving and roller coaster rides, as well as draining experiences like red-eye flights. By monitoring real-time data, we gain fascinating insights into how various stressors impact our physiological responses. From heart rate fluctuations to sleep monitoring this episode reveals how stress can be both an exhilarating and exhausting experience. As we push the limits of adventure—and our own comfort zones—we discover that creating a health series can be a surprisingly stressful endeavor in itself. Tune in to uncover the multifaceted impact of stress on our well-being and learn what we can do to manage it effectively.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Norway - Friluftsliv (Open Air Life) Part I
programme.desc: We travel to Tromsø, Norway, to discover Friluftsliv, a philosophy that values reconnecting with nature for well-being. Alongside the Sámi people, we learn to live in harmony with the Arctic environment, even during long, dark winters. The deep bond between the Sámi and reindeer shows how nature is a source of happiness and healing.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Norway - Friluftsliv (Open Air Life) Part II
programme.desc: A climb in the Lyngen Alps leads us to an untouched mountain summit, followed by a spectacular ski descent. We then dive into the icy Arctic waters to explore a unique underwater world, ending the day with a Norwegian sauna experience. This episode highlights the physical and mental benefits of connecting with the elements.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Nicobar Islands: A Monkeys Long Tale
programme.desc: Et jordskjelv målt til 9,3 rystet regionen i 2004, og Nicobarene ble ødelagt av en stor tsunami. 20 år senere tar vi en titt på de avsidesliggende øyene for å se naturens evne til å tilpasse seg millioner av år med gradvis tektonisk forandring og til å gjenopprette seg etter plutselige naturkatastrofer. Dette er en utrolig reise inn i en verden få mennesker får se.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bees
programme.desc: Bikuben er i ferd med å hente seg igjen og forbereder seg på vinteren. Men hvilke trusler møter bier rundt om i verden, og hvordan kan vi mennesker hjelpe dem med å overleve?

programme.title: Secrets of the Octopus
programme.desc: Blekkspruter er et av de mest bemerkelsesverdige dyrene på planeten, men de har en superkraft som setter dem høyt og over resten. Ved å endre farge hundrevis av ganger i timen eller forandre formen på kroppen for å etterligne deres dødeligste fiender, er de verdens mest ekstraordinære formskiftere.

programme.title: Secrets of the Octopus
programme.desc: Bevæpnet med en ekstraordinær rekke superkrefter bryter Octopuses alle reglene når det kommer til dyrs intelligens. Født inn i verden som foreldreløse, er de selvlærte masterminds som er i stand til å løse komplekse problemer, legge strategier og til og med planlegge for fremtiden.

programme.title: Apenes kongerike: Kamplinjer
programme.desc: I den afrikanske jungelen utspiller det seg et stort drama med sjimpanser og gorillaer; der krigerne kjemper, konger faller og nye strider innledes. Det blir engasjerende og rørende historier med mange fascinerende skapninger.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bees
programme.desc: Bikuben er i ferd med å hente seg igjen og forbereder seg på vinteren. Men hvilke trusler møter bier rundt om i verden, og hvordan kan vi mennesker hjelpe dem med å overleve?

programme.title: Ultimate Animals: Høydepunkter
programme.desc: Kråker er like smarte som delfiner og kan snakke som papegøyer. Ulv kan jakte i tre dager i strekk i områder like store som staten Delaware.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: Løver møtes til duell, ulver tar seg av en grizzlybjørn og en av verdens største apekatter har drapsplaner.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals: Høydepunkter
programme.desc: En tiger har tretten menns styrke og tungen deres er utstyrt med tenner. Isbjørner kan fornye sine egne bein og kan bære på kuren mot diabetes.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals: Høydepunkter
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner kan forandre formen på skjelettet sitt, mens en blekksprut pumper blodet rundt med sine tre hjerter.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: Se hva som skjer når dyr kjemper på liv og død.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: I denne episoden ser vi på den utrolige tilpasningen og utfordringene til dyrene i en verden hvor det knapt finnes noe liv.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: Løver møtes til duell, ulver tar seg av en grizzlybjørn og en av verdens største apekatter har drapsplaner.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: Se hva som skjer når dyr kjemper på liv og død.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: I denne episoden ser vi på den utrolige tilpasningen og utfordringene til dyrene i en verden hvor det knapt finnes noe liv.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: Med et nærmest uendelig teppe av grønne og gyldne fargenyanser strekker de afrikanske gresslettene seg over et enormt område. Her lever det flere store dyr enn noe annet sted i verden, og man finner noen av de største samlingene av dyr i naturen. Dyrene må tilpasse seg og handle raskt for å overleve under de tøffe og skiftende forholdene.

programme.title: Afrikas farlige rike
programme.desc: Den enorme Kalahariørkenen strekker seg over 900 000 kvadratkilometer. Det er et tørt og øde landskap der sommerregnet fører til en eksplosjon av liv inntil jorden tar til seg alt vannet. Et vakkert sted med mange undre og store kontraster, der dyrene har tilpasset seg på en helt unik måte for å kunne overleve.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: Løver møtes til duell, ulver tar seg av en grizzlybjørn og en av verdens største apekatter har drapsplaner.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: På planeten vår er det flere arter som kolliderer i naturens ville kamp for overlevelse. Fra elefanthanner som kjemper om en gruppe hunner, til en kamp mellom en løveflokk og en sulten hyene-klan, disse drapsmaskinene kjemper med tenner og klør for å vinne mat, territorier og retten til slektslinjen. Vær vitne til slåss-evnene til planetens mest fryktløse skapninger i det de kjemper for overlevelsen i de dødeligste konflikter.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: Afrika er hjem til naturens mest fryktede rovdyr som geparder, løver og hyener med flere. I villmarken er kampen om overlevelse aldri ensidig. Selv om Afrikas drapsmaskiner er noen av de beste jegerne i dyreriket, er byttedyrene deres formidable på sin egen måte. Vær vitne til at en gepardmor møtes ansikt til ansikt med en gaselles kraftige våpen, og se hva som skjer når tre hann-løver gjør sitt livs feil, og prøver å slakte et stridslystent neshorn.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: En hunnleopard slåss om lunsjen mot en stor hann, og se hvordan nilvaranen bruker halen som et dødelig våpen.

programme.title: Dyrenes Fight Club
programme.desc: Se hva som skjer når dyr kjemper på liv og død.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Når dyrene er i nød, trår veterinærene til. En hund som har blitt påkjørt må opereres med det samme, og valpesjekken gir dr. Nicole en stor overraskelse. Dr. Lisa behandler en ku med et stort sår i beinet samt en hund som ble angrepet. Dr. Pol tar imot to hunder med magebesvær og hjelper en merr med fødselen.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Pols veterinærklinikk tar stadig imot valper som ikke vil ta medisinen sin. Dr. Pol behandler tre geiter og en miniatyrhest, mens dr. Brenda undersøker et urolig reinsdyr. Veterinærene må jobbe overtid for å hjelpe hunden Tater etter at han har spist noe som kan være livsfarlig.

programme.title: Austrias Wild Heritage - One Country Six National Parks
programme.desc: Første del forteller om bakgrunnen til nasjonalparkene i Østerrike, definert av visjonene til noen visjonære mennesker og andres sivile ulydighet. Én av dem husker okkupasjonen av våtmarkene og kampen mot byggingen av en kraftstasjon samt demonstrasjonene mot etableringen av en skytebane. Samtidig blir det spennende historier fra naturen og flotte dyrebilder.

programme.title: Austrias Wild Heritage - One Country Six National Parks
programme.desc: Del to handler om fremtidens utfordringer. Hvordan håndterer nasjonalparkene fremmede arter som invaderer området og hva har man lykkes med å gjøre? I nasjonalparken Hohe Tauern har man fått tilbake tidligere utryddede artene alpesteinbukk og gribb. I Gesause-nasjonalpark har snøskred lagt til rette for yrende habitater, med sjeldne sommerfugler som apollo.
